rationale: Educ. Code §38.101 governs student physical fitness assessments and is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 38.101. ASSESSMENT REQUIRED. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (b), a school district annually shall assess the physical fitness of students enrolled in grade three or higher in a course that satisfies the curriculum requirements for physical education under Section 28.002(a)(2)(C).
_note: Rule text concerns physical fitness assessments in schools; no relationship to homestead exemption amounts.
